description_long: This object is a collection of beds arranged in a grid, each with distinct frame designs, headboards, and bedding styles. The beds feature a variety of materials, including wood, metal, and upholstered elements, with visible mattresses and bedding in colors such as blue, gray, orange, and beige. Some beds have tufted or paneled headboards, while others have simple wooden or upholstered designs. The bedding includes comforters, sheets, and pillows, with some beds displaying layered blankets. The frames range from minimalist platform styles to more traditional panel and slatted designs. The overall appearance suggests a diverse set of beds suitable for urban residential or hospitality environments.
description: A diverse group of beds with various frame designs, headboards, and bedding styles in multiple colors and materials. The collection includes both modern and traditional bed types with visible mattresses and bedding.
description_view_0: A top-down view showing the arrangement of beds in a grid, highlighting the variety of headboards and bedding colors.
description_view_1: A side view emphasizing the height and thickness of the mattresses, as well as the different headboard designs.
description_view_2: A frontal view displaying the full range of bed styles, bedding, and frame designs, with clear visibility of pillows and comforters.
description_view_3: A rear view focusing on the back of the headboards and the alignment of the beds, with some bedding and frame details visible.
